narrative:
Hebron Village (precinct in Licking County) has 1,815 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a clear Republican lean of 11.7 percentage points.
